docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH EPHREM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,711.94 FILED BY LEE HSUN AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH EPHREM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-09-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
